objects.description: Large circle with 12 lines radiating from center, resembling a wheel
12 lines radiating from the center of the circle

choreography.description: Circle and lines fade in together with a slight scale from 0.9 to 1, using ease-out-cubic.
The circle and lines rotate together clockwise, creating a wheel motion effect. Use continuous rotation with ease-in-out for smooth motion.
Rotation slows down and holds. The circle and lines fade out together over the last second with ease-in.
